sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46950" key="h)luska/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠλυσκάζω</orth>, <sense id="n46950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἠλασκάζω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἦλφον</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀλφάνω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἥλω</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἁλίσκομαι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠλώμην</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀλάομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
